Terms of Use

  • Home
  • /
  • Terms of Use

Last updated: July 2026

1. General

The website four-walls.gr (hereinafter "the website") is owned and operated by Four Walls, a real estate agency with its registered office in Thessaloniki, Greece, at Fragkini 9, 54624 (hereinafter "Four Walls", "we"). Browsing and using the website constitutes unreserved acceptance of these terms. If you do not agree with them, please do not use the website.

2. Services provided

Four Walls provides real estate brokerage services: purchase, sale, letting, valuation, renovation and management of properties in Thessaloniki and the wider area. The website is informational in nature and its purpose is to present our services and the properties we have available.

3. Property listings

The details of the properties displayed (prices, floor areas, features, photographs) originate from their owners and are entered with the greatest possible care. However:

  • The information is provided "as is" and may contain inaccuracies or may have changed without prior notice (e.g. a price change or the withdrawal of a property).
  • The listings do not constitute an offer to enter into a contract; the definitive details of each property are confirmed during the viewing and the legal and technical due diligence.
  • The prices stated are indicative and do not bind the respective owner.

4. Intellectual property

The entire content of the website — texts, property photographs, logo, graphics and distinctive signs — is the intellectual property of Four Walls or its rightholders and is protected by Greek and European legislation. Its reproduction, copying or republication, in whole or in part, without our prior written permission is prohibited.

5. User obligations

Users must use the website in accordance with the law and good morals. By way of example, the following are prohibited:

  • the bulk extraction or copying of the listings and content (scraping) for commercial or any other use,
  • any action that may damage or impair the operation of the website,
  • the submission of false or misleading information through the contact forms.

6. Limitation of liability

We make every reasonable effort to ensure that the website operates smoothly and that its content is accurate and up to date. However, we do not guarantee its uninterrupted and error-free operation, and we accept no liability for any damage that may arise from its use or from the inability to access it.

7. Links to third-party websites

The website may contain links to third-party websites (e.g. social media, listing platforms). We do not control their content or practices and accept no responsibility for them; access to them is at the user's sole risk.

8. Personal data

The processing of the personal data you provide to us through the website is described in detail in the Privacy Policy and in the Cookies notice.

9. Amendments

We reserve the right to amend these terms at any time. The version in force at any given time is published on this page together with the date of its last update. Continued use of the website after an amendment constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

10. Governing law

These terms are governed by Greek law. The courts of Thessaloniki, Greece, are designated as competent for any dispute that may arise from the use of the website.

11. Contact

For any questions regarding these Terms of Use, you may contact us:

  • Four Walls — Fragkini 9, 54624 Thessaloniki, Greece
  • Email: info@four-walls.gr
  • Phone: +30 6907 483 463

Prevailing language

These Terms of Use are provided in English for convenience. In the event of any discrepancy between the English translation and the Greek original, the Greek version (available at /terms-of-use) prevails.

Fragkini 9, 54624 Thessaloniki, Greece

info@four-walls.gr +30 6907 483 463
